channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Xbox Series S Blamed for Game Delay
item.description: Moon Studio's founder cites Xbox Series S as a reason for the delay of their RPG, No Rest for the Wicked. The console faces ongoing criticism.

item.title: God of War Laufey Crowned Best PS5 Game
item.description: At the latest State of Play, God of War Laufey was voted the best PS5 game, with Wolverine trailing closely behind. The event showcased numerous high-quality titles.

item.title: Google Health 5.01 Update Rolls Out
item.description: Google Health app version 5.01 is now available, featuring 16 updates focused on nutrition, fitness, and sleep improvements. Users can expect enhanced functionality.

item.title: Valve Set to Launch Steam Machine This Summer
item.description: Valve announces the upcoming launch of the Steam Machine and Steam Frame VR headset this summer, both featuring Verified programs for optimal game performance.

item.title: Nadella Uncertain About Microsoft's AI Strategy
item.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella expresses confusion over claims of the company wanting to create addictive AI. He seeks clarity on the internal strategy.

item.title: Filtr Blocks Ads on iPhone and Mac Apps
item.description: Filtr, a new privacy tool, now blocks ads in nearly all iPhone and Mac apps, enhancing user privacy and security with the latest Apple software update.

item.title: Cyberdecks Evolve Beyond Laptops
item.description: Cyberdecks are transforming into creative art projects, moving away from traditional laptop designs. Social media showcases these unique, personalized creations.

item.title: Samsung Health App Gets AI Redesign
item.description: Ahead of the Galaxy Watch 9 launch, Samsung Health is undergoing a significant AI-centric redesign, enhancing user experience and functionality.

item.title: Ubisoft Teases Rayman's Future
item.description: Ubisoft hints at exciting developments for the Rayman franchise, marking a resurgence after years of limited activity. Fans can expect more content soon.

item.title: Google Allows Creators to Customize Search Profiles
item.description: Google introduces customizable search profiles for creators and publishers, enabling them to showcase their content prominently in search results.

item.title: Run Google's Gemini LLMs Locally on Mac
item.description: Google's AI Edge Gallery app now allows Mac users to run Gemini large language models locally, eliminating the need for internet connectivity.

item.title: Ferrari and HP Launch Supercar-Inspired Laptop
item.description: Ferrari and HP unveil a laptop designed with supercar aesthetics and engineering, pushing the boundaries of traditional PC design.

item.title: GTA Online Introduces New Community Missions
item.description: GTA Online launches new community missions, featuring player-created experiences and showcasing new creators. Available on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.

item.title: DIY AI Laser System Eliminates Mosquitoes
item.description: An engineer creates a DIY AI laser system that effectively eliminates mosquitoes at home using deep learning and computer vision technology.

item.title: Apple Arcade Expands with Four New Games
item.description: Apple Arcade adds four new games to its extensive library, with five more titles set to arrive soon, enhancing its gaming offerings.
